dc:title: Street view beside historic stone walls and domed church
dc:description: Color street scene photographed from a low vantage point behind bicycle or scooter handlebars, with the foreground intentionally out of focus. A curving urban road runs alongside a long historic stone wall with crenellated sections on the left. Behind the wall rises a church or civic building with a prominent domed roof and small lantern. Several vehicles travel along the road, including a blurred blue car passing at left and smaller cars and a van farther ahead. A pedestrian walks on the sidewalk near the wall. On the right side of the street are trees, a lamppost, bollards, and low commercial or residential buildings with an outdoor seating area. The image is sunlit with a clear blue sky and has the grain and color characteristics of a digitized color negative.
